routes.query: INSERT INTO customers (firstName, lastName, email) VALUES ('{{ body.data.firstName }}', '{{ body.data.lastName }}', '{{ body.data.email }}') RETURNING *;
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id={{ params.id }}
